submission_requirements.language_column_rule: Use 3-letter ISO 639-3 codes only, never full language names.

competition_rules.language_column: Use ISO 639-3 codes only: swa, kik, luo, som, mas, kln.
competition_rules.test_audio_policy: No manual transcription or human correction of test audio.
competition_rules.open_source_license: Publish code, training scripts, checkpoints, weights, model cards, and data cards under MIT, Apache-2.0, BSD-3-Clause, MPL-2.0, or another OSI-approved permissive license.
competition_rules.technical_report: Top 5 teams must provide a short technical report; track winners must publish a detailed blog post or workshop paper.
competition_rules.reproducibility_artifacts: Organizers may request training logs, checkpoints, hardware specs, and reproducibility evidence.
competition_rules.external_models: External pretrained models are allowed only when properly cited and license-compatible.
competition_rules.external_tools: External tools/data must be publicly accessible, free or minimal cost, and reasonably available to all participants.
competition_rules.edge_memory_limit: Must run inference on edge devices with 8 GB RAM or less.
competition_rules.hardware_report: Include test-set inference latency and hardware specifications.
competition_rules.governing_law: Unless otherwise specified, competition rules are governed by the laws of Rwanda.

dataset_summary.license: CC BY 4.0 for Kaggle test dataset package as documented by the data page

checks.label: Kaggle CSV format
checks.action: Generate a submission from Metadata > Kaggle submission builder. Header must be id,language,prediction.

checks.label: Full Kaggle test inference
checks.action: Run inference on the complete Kaggle test dataset and save one JSONL row per test audio file.

checks.label: Real trained or fine-tuned checkpoint
checks.action: Add checkpoint metadata that points to the trained model artifact used for inference.

checks.label: Public model weights/checkpoints
checks.action: Publish model weights/checkpoints to GitHub Releases or Hugging Face and add public_weights_url.

checks.label: Edge memory <= 8 GB
checks.action: Benchmark or estimate peak model memory and keep it at or below 8 GB.

checks.label: Hardware latency report
checks.action: Run the latency script on an edge device or edge-like machine and save reports/hardware_latency_report.json.

checks.label: No manual correction of test audio
checks.action: Keep the test-set prediction path fully automated and do not manually transcribe or correct test audio.

checks.label: Team and leaderboard policy
checks.action: Keep team size at 5 or fewer participants and use one leaderboard account per team.

checks.label: Open-source release checklist
checks.action: Publish code, training scripts, checkpoints, weights, model cards, and data cards under an OSI-approved permissive license.

checks.label: Third-party license review
checks.action: Document pretrained models, dependencies, external tools, external data, and any incompatible licenses.

checks.label: Permissive open-source license
checks.detail: Repository license found: True; model license: missing.
checks.action: Use MIT, Apache-2.0, BSD-3-Clause, or MPL-2.0 and record the model license.

checks.label: Model card included
checks.action: Create a model card covering languages, datasets, WER, limitations, intended use, and ethics.

checks.label: Dataset card included
checks.action: Include the organizer-provided dataset card and source repository references with the final submission.

checks.label: Competition terms acknowledgement
checks.action: Document acceptance of competition-specific rules and Kaggle foundational rules.

checks.label: Training logs and reproducibility artifacts
checks.action: Save training logs, hardware specs, checkpoints, and reproducibility notes.
